items.stem: Which choice shows a responsible action during a lesson on development of?

options.label: A
options.text: Listen, follow safety rules and ask for help when unsure

options.label: B
options.text: Ignore instructions and work alone without checking

options.label: C
options.text: Copy another learner without understanding

options.label: D
options.text: Leave the activity before it is completed

items.explanation: Responsible learners follow rules and seek help. Read the question carefully, rule out answers that do not fit the facts, and choose the option that matches what you worked out.

distractor_rationale.B: This option shows a common error with responsible behaviour.
distractor_rationale.C: This option shows a common error with responsible behaviour.
distractor_rationale.D: This option shows a common error with responsible behaviour.
